message.content:
@startuml
participant User
participant Adder
participant Value
participant Expression

User -> Adder : Start the operation
Adder -> Adder : applyTo
Adder -> Value : getTypeMatrix
Adder -> Expression : getLeftOperand
Adder -> Value : getTypeMatrix
Adder -> Expression : getRightOperand
Adder --> User : result
@enduml
